channel.title: Google on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Google on Arrans github.io

item.title: smol-ai/GodMode
item.description: AI Chat Browser: Fast, Full webapp access to ChatGPT / Claude / Bard / Bing / Llama2! I use this 20 times a day.

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, MCP, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Responses API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-5, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active.

item.title: steipete/gogcli
item.description: Google Suite CLI: Gmail, GCal, GDrive, GContacts.

item.title: gemini-cli-extensions/jules
item.description: A Gemini CLI extension that allows you to use the Gemini CLI to orchestrate the Jules asynchronous agent to perform coding tasks like bug fixing, refactoring, and dependency updates.

item.title: google/comprehensive-rust
item.description: This is the Rust course used by the Android team at Google. It provides you the material to quickly teach Rust.

item.title: arran4/flutter_google_datastore
item.description: Google Datastore and Datastore emulator client for “easy” modification of values
